Providers & advocates

Healthcare depends on the human touch.

As Al changes so much about the world, it's important to choose a team with the right people and a meaningful mission.

See our open roles

Helping people, on your terms.

We know that the human touch in healthcare is often the difference between a hospital visit and safely aging at home. Surgeries save lives, but so do the check-ins, the follow-ups, and the phone calls that catch a problem before it becomes a crisis.

It's this under-celebrated work, carried out every day by millions of nurses and social workers, that keeps our impossibly large healthcare system running.

The team is special.

Talented doctors, nurses, LCSWs, and care coordinators from every corner of the country.

We come from:

Baba Care, 2026

Baba Care, Inc. is a private online software technology company not affiliated with nor endorsed by any Government agency. Baba Care, Inc. does not charge clients for any official Government forms; however, we charge fees for the use of Baba Care, Inc. software in assisting clients with accurately completing such forms. Baba Care, Inc. is not a financial, accounting or law firm and does not provide legal or financial advice.
